{
  "analysis": "There's a syntax error with f-strings containing newlines. The issue is that f-strings in the triple-quoted code contain backslash-n which became literal newlines. I need to rewrite the file more carefully.",
  "plan": "Use Python to write the file, being careful with f-strings and escaping. I'll avoid f-strings in the generated code and use .format() or concatenation instead.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /tmp/write_script.py << 'XEOF'
lines = []
lines.append('import numpy as np')
lines.append('import sys')
lines.append('sys.path.insert(0, "/app")')
lines.append('from forward import forward')
lines.append('')
lines.append('def compute_gradient(x, h=1e-7):')
lines.append('    x = np.array(x, dtype=float)')
lines.append('    g = np.zeros(10)')
lines.append('    fx = forward(x)')
lines.append('    for i in range(10):')
lines.append('        xp = x.copy()')
lines.append('        xp[i] += h')
lines.append('        g[i] = (forward(xp) - fx) / h')
lines.append('    return g')
lines.append('')
lines.append('np.random.seed(42)')
lines.append('TRANS_THRESH = 1e-5')
lines.append('STEP = 0.02')
lines.append('STEPS_PER_WALK = 500')
lines.append('gradient_diffs = []')
lines.append('')
lines.append('for trial in range(200):')
lines.append('    if trial % 20 == 0:')
lines.append('        print("Walk %d, found %d transitions" % (trial, len(gradient_diffs)))')
lines.append('    d = np.random.randn(10)')
lines.append('    d = d / np.linalg.norm(d)')
lines.append('    x_cur = np.zeros(10)')
lines.append('    g_cur = compute_gradient(x_cur)')
lines.append('    for step in range(STEPS_PER_WALK):')
lines.append('        x_next = (step + 1) * STEP * d')
lines.append('        g_next = compute_gradient(x_next)')
lines.append('        diff_norm = np.linalg.norm(g_next - g_cur)')
lines.append('        if diff_norm > TRANS_THRESH:')
lines.append('            lo_t = float(step * STEP)')
lines.append('            hi_t = float((step + 1) * STEP)')
lines.append('            g_lo = g_cur.copy()')
lines.append('            g_hi = g_next.copy()')
lines.append('            for _ in range(60):')
lines.append('                mid_t = (lo_t + hi_t) / 2')
lines.append('                x_mid = mid_t * d')
lines.append('                g_mid = compute_gradient(x_mid)')
lines.append('                if np.linalg.norm(g_mid - g_lo) > TRANS_THRESH:')
lines.append('                    hi_t = mid_t')
lines.append('                    g_hi = g_mid')
lines.append('                else:')
lines.append('                    lo_t = mid_t')
lines.append('                    g_lo = g_mid')
lines.append('            dg = g_hi - g_lo')
lines.append('            if np.linalg.norm(dg) > TRANS_THRESH:')
lines.append('                gradient_diffs.append(dg.copy())')
lines.append('        x_cur = x_next')
lines.append('        g_cur = g_next')
lines.append('')
lines.append('print("Total transitions: %d" % len(gradient_diffs))')
lines.append('')
lines.append('clusters = []')
lines.append('for v in gradient_diffs:')
lines.append('    norm = np.linalg.norm(v)')
lines.append('    if norm < 1e-10:')
lines.append('        continue')
lines.append('    v_dir = v / norm')
lines.append('    matched = False')
lines.append('    for c in clusters:')
lines.append('        cos_sim = abs(np.dot(v_dir, c[0]))')
lines.append('        if cos_sim > 0.95:')
lines.append('            c[1] += v')
lines.append('            c[2] += 1')
lines.append('            matched = True')
lines.append('            break')
lines.append('    if not matched:')
lines.append('        clusters.append([v_dir, v.copy(), 1])')
lines.append('')
lines.append('print("Found %d clusters at tol 0.95" % len(clusters))')
lines.append('')
lines.append('for tol in [0.90, 0.85, 0.80, 0.70, 0.50]:')
lines.append('    if len(clusters) >= 20:')
lines.append('        break')
lines.append('    clusters = []')
lines.append('    for v in gradient_diffs:')
lines.append('        norm = np.linalg.norm(v)')
lines.append('        if norm < 1e-10:')
lines.append('            continue')
lines.append('        v_dir = v / norm')
lines.append('        matched = False')
lines.append('        for c in clusters:')
lines.append('            cos_sim = abs(np.dot(v_dir, c[0]))')
lines.append('            if cos_sim > tol:')
lines.append('                c[1] += v')
lines.append('                c[2] += 1')
lines.append('                matched = True')
lines.append('                break')
lines.append('        if not matched:')
lines.append('            clusters.append([v_dir, v.copy(), 1])')
lines.append('    print("Tol %.2f: %d clusters" % (tol, len(clusters)))')
lines.append('')
lines.append('clusters.sort(key=lambda c: c[2], reverse=True)')
lines.append('')
lines.append('extracted = []')
lines.append('for i in range(min(20, len(clusters))):')
lines.append('    avg = clusters[i][1] / clusters[i][2]')
lines.append('    extracted.append(avg)')
lines.append('    print("Cluster %d: count=%d, norm=%.6f" % (i, clusters[i][2], np.linalg.norm(avg)))')
lines.append('')
lines.append('stolen_A1 = np.array(extracted)')
lines.append('print("Stolen A1 shape:", stolen_A1.shape)')
lines.append('np.save("/app/stolen_A1.npy", stolen_A1)')
lines.append('print("Saved to /app/stolen_A1.npy")')
lines.append('')
lines.append('import forward as fwd')
lines.append('tA = fwd.A1')
lines.append('for i in range(min(5, len(extracted))):')
lines.append('    v = extracted[i]')
lines.append('    v_n = v / np.linalg.norm(v)')
lines.append('    best_s, best_j = 0, -1')
lines.append('    for j in range(20):')
lines.append('        t = tA[j]')
lines.append('        t_n = t / np.linalg.norm(t)')
lines.append('        s = abs(np.dot(v_n, t_n))')
lines.append('        if s > best_s:')
lines.append('            best_s = s')
lines.append('            best_j = j')
lines.append('    print("Row %d -> True %d, cos_sim=%.6f" % (i, best_j, best_s))')

with open('/app/steal.py', 'w') as f:
    f.write('\n'.join(lines) + '\n')
print('Written successfully')
XEOF
